name: Moroccan Chicken with Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cilantro, paprika, cumin, salt, turmeric, ginger, and garlic.
2. Rub the mixture on all sides of chicken.
3. Coat the chicken with flour.
4. Place the chicken in an ungreased 13x9x2 inch baking dish.
5. Mix water, lemon juice, and bouillon.
6. Pour the liquid over the chicken.
7. Add olives and lemon slices.
8. Cook uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit, spooning juices over the chicken occasionally, until the thickest pieces of chicken are done, about 1 hour.
9. Serve with couscous or rice if desired.
